name: The Scholars' Guild
motto: What is known cannot be destroyed — only hidden.
goal: Recover, preserve, and share all knowledge destroyed in the Great Purge.

faction_state.tensions: Wardens have begun confiscating unregistered texts. The Guild suspects the Purge was sanctioned, not accidental.

name: The Merchant Collective
motto: Prosperity demands stability. Stability demands compromise.
goal: Maintain the trade networks and economic equilibrium that keep Concordia fed and funded.

faction_state.tensions: The Collective profits from the current order but privately fears the Wardens are consolidating too much power. Cade wants to stay neutral; Sael is selling information to both sides.

name: The Shadow Network
motto: Every secret has a price. We simply know them all.
goal: Maintain the balance of power by ensuring no single faction controls all information.

faction_state.tensions: The Network holds evidence of who ordered the Purge. They have been waiting for the right moment — or the right buyer.

name: The Iron Wardens
motto: Order is not given. It is enforced.
goal: Maintain absolute security across Concordia's gates and public spaces — by force if necessary.
fears: their role in the Purge becoming public

faction_state.tensions: Voss authorized the Purge. Rael only recently discovered this and has not yet decided what to do with the knowledge.
